title: Adoption: partner uses an explainer with its community; comprehension improvement recorded
context: This is the Definition of Shipped for incidence-explorers: a real beneficiary organisation uses the explainers with its community and people demonstrably read the statistics more correctly, with data/license/medical-safety guardrails independently verified. The project is not 'shipped' on merge — it ships when real beneficiaries adopt and benefit. This task records the closed-loop outcome. Depends on a secured beneficiary (incidence-explorers-partner-016). No partner is yet secured.
objective: Close the deed loop: the secured partner (from incidence-explorers-partner-016) demonstrably uses at least one explainer with its community; a comprehension improvement is recorded using the instrument from incidence-explorers-readiness-015; the 'not medical advice' framing is upheld throughout community use; and the guardrails (data, license, medical-safety) are independently verified and the outcome is recorded by the steward.
acceptanceCriteria: The partner demonstrably uses at least one explainer with its community (recorded by the steward with evidence of use)

A comprehension improvement is recorded using the before/after comprehension instrument from incidence-explorers-readiness-015; improvement is statistically meaningful or meets the pre-agreed threshold
'Not medical advice — talk to your care team' framing is upheld throughout community use; no advice/diagnosis/prognosis claims are made in partner materials
Guardrails are independently verified at the point of community use: aggregate-only sources, provenanced assertions, suppression honoured, oncologist + advocate sign-off confirmed, helplines verified
The outcome is recorded by the steward and constitutes the Definition of Shipped for the incidence-explorers project
output: A steward-attested adoption record documenting that the partner used the explainer with its community, the comprehension improvement recorded, 'not medical advice' framing upheld, and guardrails independently verified — constituting the Definition of Shipped for incidence-explorers.
